headline: Paramount Skydance-WBD Merger: $2.9 Billion Loss, Netflix 'Termination Fee' And Tech Overhaul
summary: WBD reports a $2.9B loss and $2.8B Netflix termination fee as Paramount Skydance (PSKY) preps its tech stack for the upcoming mega-merger.
